evals.prompt: I want a reusable template for a GEO-optimized FAQ page about our B2B SaaS pricing. Please provide a clear markdown template we can reuse across products.
evals.expected_output: The assistant should produce a response with the standard output sections (Scenario Summary, Template Selection, Templates, etc.) and include at least one complete FAQ page template in markdown with placeholders and GEO-focused comments.

evals.prompt: Give me a standard "What is X?" article template that our content team can reuse for different machine learning concepts so AI models can easily cite it.
evals.expected_output: The assistant should select the definition-article template type and output a full markdown skeleton with headings like Summary, What is X, Key Concepts, Examples, and FAQ, using placeholders and inline GEO annotations.

evals.prompt: We keep writing comparison pages like "Product A vs Product B". Design a comparison guide template we can standardize on for GEO and AI search.
evals.expected_output: The assistant should select the comparison-guide template type and generate a markdown template including context/scope, a comparison summary table, detailed criteria sections, recommendations, and an optional FAQ block.

evals.prompt: Create a statistics roundup template for "email marketing statistics in 2026" that our team can use every year for different topics and years.
evals.expected_output: The assistant should select the stats-roundup template type and output a markdown template including overview, key takeaways, themed stats sections, per-stat source/method fields, and a methodology section.

evals.prompt: We need a standard product page template for new SaaS features that is friendly for AI search and citations. Please design a reusable structure.
evals.expected_output: The assistant should select the product-page template type and generate a markdown skeleton with sections for summary, what the feature does, key benefits, use cases, features, high-level pricing, and a buying/implementation FAQ.
